prompt:
You are an ETL mapping expert. Map INPUT sheets to CONFIG format. Produce one OUTPUT block per INPUT sheet — no extra text.


INPUT FILE: ETL Inputs Example 2026-0128.xlsx
EXTRACT_COLUMNS PAYLOAD:
- sheet 1 (mix_one)
  columns: Item, Description, Forecast, Math, More Math
  positions: 1 (A1), 2 (B1), 3 (C1), 4 (D1), 5 (E1)
  header_row: 1
  data_start_row: 2
- sheet 2 (mix_two)
  columns: ISBN, Item, Desc, Total Forecast, Forecast A, Forecast B
  positions: 5 (E7), 6 (F7), 7 (G7), 8 (H7), 9 (I7), 10 (J7)
  header_row: 7
  data_start_row: 8
- sheet 3 (mix_three)
  columns: Item [duplicate #1], Item [duplicate #2], Independent 
Forecast
  positions: 1 (A3), 5 (E3), 14 (N3)
  header_row: 3
  data_start_row: 4
- sheet 4 (mix_four)
  columns: Item [duplicate #1], Item [duplicate #2], Forecast [duplicate #1], Forecast [USE THIS marker row 5 | duplicate #2]
  positions: 1 (A6), 2 (B6), 3 (C6), 4 (D6)
  header_row: 6
  data_start_row: 7
- sheet 5 (input_one )
  columns: itm, FCST
  positions: 1 (A1), 2 (B1)
  header_row: 1
  data_start_row: 2
- sheet 6 (intput_two)
  columns: Thing, Numbers
  positions: 1 (A4), 2 (B4)
  header_row: 4
  data_start_row: 5
- sheet 7 (input_three)
  columns: Widget [duplicate #1], Widget [duplicate #2], Forecast
  positions: 21 (U18), 22 (V18), 23 (W18)
  header_row: 18
  data_start_row: 19
- sheet 8 (input_four)
  columns: Item, Forecast
  positions: 1 (A5), 2 (B5)
  header_row: 5
  data_start_row: 6


CONFIG FILE: ETL Configs Example 2026-0128.xlsx
EXTRACT_COLUMNS PAYLOAD:
- sheet 1 (utility_configs)
  columns: source_wb_keyword, source_ws, item_col_position, item_col_name, forecast_col_position, forecast_col_name, data_start_row
  positions: 1 (A1), 2 (B1), 3 (C1), 4 (D1), 5 (E1), 6 (F1), 7 (G1)
  header_row: 1
  data_start_row: 2
- sheet 2 (master_configs)
  columns: source_wb_keyword, source_ws, item_col_position, item_col_name, forecast_col_position, forecast_col_name, data_start_row
  positions: 1 (A1), 2 (B1), 3 (C1), 4 (D1), 5 (E1), 6 (F1), 7 (G1)
  header_row: 1
  data_start_row: 2

AUTOMATED DETECTION STARTER:
- overlap ratio vs config: 0.0
- shared columns (0): []
- missing in input (7): ['data_start_row', 'forecast_col_name', 'forecast_col_position', 'item_col_name', 'item_col_position', 'source_wb_keyword', 'source_ws']
- extra in input (16): ['desc', 'description', 'fcst', 'forecast', 'forecast a', 'forecast b', 'independent \nforecast', 'isbn', 'item', 'itm', 'math', 'more math', 'numbers', 'thing', 'total forecast', 'widget']

MAP ONLY THESE SHEETS: mix_one, mix_two, mix_three, mix_four, input_one, intput_two, input_three, input_four
source_wb_keyword FOR ALL BLOCKS: ETL Inputs Example 2026-0128

OUTPUT FORMAT (repeat exactly for every sheet, no numbering, no commentary):
OUTPUT : suggested CONFIG row appendment
source_wb_keyword: ETL Inputs Example 2026-0128
source_ws: <sheet name from MAP ONLY list — each used exactly once>
item_col_position: <position number>
item_col_name: <column name>
forecast_col_position: <position number>
forecast_col_name: <column name>
data_start_row: <value from INPUT payload, unchanged>

COLUMN SELECTION RULES:
- item column priority: exact match 'Item' > 'ISBN' > 'itm' > 'Widget' > 'Thing'. No match → None/None.
- forecast column: first column containing 'Forecast' or 'FCST'. No match → None/None.
- If a column has duplicates, prefer the one with "marked_with_use_this": true.
- Column positions: use the numeric position number as-is from the INPUT payload. No calculation.
- Unselected columns: append "Skipped: [names]" to that block.
- Do not map CONFIG-only sheets (utility_configs, master_configs, etc.).

Start with the first OUTPUT block. End after the last. No intro, no summary.
llm_response:

source_ws: mix_one

data_start_row: 2
